message.content: I'm migrating our auth from session cookies to JWT this week. Starting with the token issuer service — new signing keys, short-lived access tokens, refresh-token rotation.
Once the issuer is solid I'm going to remove the old cookie-session path entirely — it's been a maintenance drag and I want one auth model, not two. Planning to delete it next sprint.
I need the issuer shipped by Thursday so the rest of the rollout has time to bake before the release.
